query:
-- Update players table with puzzle stats from cycle_history
UPDATE players p
SET 
  totalPuzzles = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  totalCorrect = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.correctCount), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  totalTimeMs = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalTimeMs), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  completedCycles = (
    SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  accuracy = ROUND(
    COALESCE(SUM(ch.correctCount), 0) / 
    NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0), 0) * 100, 2
  ),
  lastActivityAt = COALESCE(
    (SELECT MAX(ch.completedAt) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = p.userId),
    NOW()
  )
WHERE p.userId IS NOT NULL;

-- Verify the update
SELECT id, userId, name, totalPuzzles, totalCorrect, completedCycles, accuracy FROM players WHERE totalPuzzles > 0 ORDER BY totalPuzzles DESC;
